title: DOM elements should use the autocomplete attribute correctly
description: DOM elements should use the "autocomplete" attribute correctlyAnalyze your codeconsistency-conventionalmaintainabilityreliabilityCode SmellaccessibilityreactWhy is this an issue?How can I fix it?More InfoNot providing autocomplete values in form fields can lead to content inaccessibility. The function of each standard input field, which gathers a person’s personal data, is systematically determined according to the list of53 Input Purposes for User Interface Components. If the necessary autocomplete attribute values are absent, screen readers will not be able to identify and read these fields.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.
